responses: Wear light cotton or linen clothes. Choose loose-fitting and light-colored outfits.
Use breathable fabrics like cotton. Avoid dark colors in high heat.
Drink at least 500ml of water every hour in hot conditions.
Increase water intake and avoid caffeine during high heat.
Avoid going outside between 12 PM and 3 PM.
Heat levels are high. Limit outdoor exposure.
Urban Heat Island means cities are 2–5°C hotter due to concrete and lack of greenery.
Buildings and roads trap heat, making cities hotter than rural areas.
I can help with heat, weather, clothing, and hydration. Try asking about those.
